_comment: Temporary ignore list for the setup pull request (chore/project-setup).
These codes cover pre-existing AAA failures in the original LLBS codebase.
They are documented in docs/accessibility.md under the section
'Pre-existing AAA failures, deferred to the accessibility phase', and tracked
in todo.md. The accessibility phase pull request MUST remove each ignore as
the corresponding finding is fixed. Do not add new codes here without a
matching entry in docs/accessibility.md and todo.md.
The Level A canvas accessible-name code is intentionally NOT listed here,
because that finding was resolved in the setup pull request.
